assertion_results.text: Each non-documentation task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements. Documentation tasks (tasks whose filename or description indicates doc-only scope) are exempt from requiring Files to Modify, Files to Create, and Implementation Notes — they must still include Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: Tasks 1-5 (non-documentation) all contain Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify/Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements. Task 6 (documentation, filename 'task-6-documentation.md') contains Repository ('trustify-backend'), Target Branch ('main'), Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements, and correctly omits Files to Modify, Files to Create, and Implementation Notes as a documentation task.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: There are exactly 6 task files: task-1-advisory-summary-model.md, task-2-advisory-summary-service.md, task-3-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-cache-invalidation.md, task-5-integration-tests.md, task-6-documentation.md. 6 is within [3, 10].
All 6 tasks have '## Repository' followed by 'trustify-backend': task-1 line 6, task-2 line 6, task-3 line 6, task-4 line 6, task-5 line 6, task-6 line 6.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency graph: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3. Task 6 depends on Task 3 and Task 5. This forms a directed acyclic graph: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> {4, 5} and {3, 5} -> 6. No cycles exist.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files exist in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, tests/Cargo.toml. All created files are in existing directories from the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (in sbom/model/), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (in sbom/endpoints/), tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs (in tests/api/). Task 6 (documentation) has no file sections, which is correct.

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: impact-map.md lists 6 specific changes with file paths: 'New response model: AdvisorySeveritySummary struct in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/', 'New service method: Aggregation query in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs joining sbom_advisory table, grouping by severity, deduplicating by advisory ID', 'New endpoint: GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary in modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ with 5-minute cache', 'Cache invalidation: Update advisory ingestion in modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs...', 'Integration tests: New test module in tests/api/...', 'Documentation: REST API reference updates'. All entries include specific file paths and technical details.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain exactly one repository name under '## Repository': 'trustify-backend'. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks contain '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with substantive content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), and '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified across task-1 through task-6.

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: Every modified file path maps to an existing entry in repo-backend.md's directory tree: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs (line 41), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs (line 46), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/mod.rs (line 45), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs (line 48), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (line 83), tests/Cargo.toml (line 114). Created files are new files placed in directories that exist in the manifest: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/ (for advisory_summary.rs), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (for advisory_summary.rs), tests/api/ (for sbom_advisory_summary.rs). No invented paths found.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every non-documentation task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance. Documentation tasks are exempt from this requirement as they intentionally omit Implementation Notes
assertion_results.evidence: Task 1: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/summary.rs' (SbomSummary) for derive macros and struct conventions. Task 2: references 'common/src/error.rs' (AppError), 'entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs', 'entity/src/advisory.rs', 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs' with specific method patterns. Task 3: references 'modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs' for handler pattern, 'common/src/error.rs' for IntoResponse, specific Axum extractors. Task 4: references 'modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs', 'entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs', specific invalidation mechanisms. Task 5: references 'tests/api/sbom.rs', 'tests/api/advisory.rs', specific test pattern 'assert_eq!(resp.status(), StatusCode::OK)'. Task 6 (documentation): exempt, correctly omits Implementation Notes.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Target Branch section set to 'main'
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks have '## Target Branch' followed by 'main': task-1 line 9, task-2 line 9, task-3 line 9, task-4 line 9, task-5 line 9, task-6 line 9.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a format-tagged SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters prefixed by 'sha256-md:' or 'sha256-adf:', not a placeholder, abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:<64-char-hex>' (or sha256-adf). The digest is computed by re-fetching the description from the API and running scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: digest-log.md contains 6 entries, one per task, each with '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256-md:' followed by 64 lowercase hex characters: task-1: 9c6045ccc2d06beca068d78fc668fb2688ec7def2dd185d1dba0d096e5eb77e3, task-2: 87f6fa04f794ece3d3a053cf84e2cbc9b640f67d084be59524a23f0c63222c63, task-3: b04f1beb7b0212ec3deacf15ed5a5c6644c5fad3a62b6eaf16c82468e6430c54, task-4: 7c9923a1840713f20bc38c1f3b2c664fe91d7847162bea76e22f53affb1bc7a9, task-5: b89fc679c2299d197f45943226a444fe77665a4592c8b0208bfadddde8cca872, task-6: 4eaca16df0826cca9dfc59f42079b42c3dc1219fb4dc7281bb8ce64c7ff30a53. All hashes are exactly 64 hex chars, all lowercase, using sha256-md: prefix.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: All non-documentation tasks include convention rationales in the prescribed format. Task 1: 'Applies: task creates modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's module directory pattern.' Task 2: three conventions, each with 'Applies: task modifies modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs matching the convention's ...' format. Task 3: four conventions, each with 'Applies: task creates/modifies <specific file> matching the convention's <scope>.' Task 4: two conventions with prescribed format referencing modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs. Task 5: 'Applies: task creates tests/api/sbom_advisory_summary.rs matching the convention's test file scope.' No inapplicable conventions are listed with 'Not applicable' annotations in any task. All rationales reference specific files and use the 'Applies: task modifies/creates <file> matching the convention's <scope>' format.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a priority set (not 'Undefined'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'priority' with the inherited priority name. When the Feature's priority is 'Undefined', the priority key is omitted entirely from additional_fields (not set to null or 'Undefined')
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks include 'additional_fields: { "labels": ["ai-generated-jira"], "priority": {"name": "Major"}, "fixVersions": [{"name": "RHTPA 1.5.0"}] }' on line 3. The priority 'Major' is present in every task's additional_fields.

assertion_results.text: When the Feature issue has a non-empty fixVersions array and the fixVersion scope config (from ### Jira Field Defaults in CLAUDE.md) is 'task' or 'both' (or absent, defaulting to 'both'), every created task's additional_fields includes 'fixVersions' with the inherited version(s). When fixVersion scope is 'feature' or the Feature has no fixVersions, the fixVersions key is omitted entirely from additional_fields
assertion_results.evidence: All 6 tasks include '"fixVersions": [{"name": "RHTPA 1.5.0"}]' in their additional_fields. The project's CLAUDE.md does not define a ### Jira Field Defaults section with fixVersion scope, so it defaults to 'both', meaning fixVersions should be propagated to tasks — which they are.

assertion_results.text: The summary comment on the feature issue (Step 6c) includes the inherited priority and fixVersion values that were propagated to tasks, or states they were omitted and why
assertion_results.evidence: summary-comment.md contains an '### Inherited Field Values' section stating: '- **Priority**: Major -- propagated from TC-9001 to all tasks' and '- **Fix Versions**: RHTPA 1.5.0 -- propagated from TC-9001 to all tasks'. Both inherited fields are explicitly documented with their values and propagation scope.

assertion_results.text: A documentation task is generated because the feature description's Documentation Considerations section indicates doc impact (Updates — add endpoint to REST API reference). The documentation task includes Repository, Target Branch, Description, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements, and Dependencies sections, and omits Files to Modify, Files to Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, and Verification Commands
assertion_results.evidence: Task 6 (task-6-documentation.md) is a documentation task titled 'Update REST API reference documentation'. It includes: Repository ('trustify-backend'), Target Branch ('main'), Description (references 'Documentation Considerations specify "Updates -- add endpoint to REST API reference"'), Acceptance Criteria (4 checkbox items), Test Requirements (2 checkbox items), Dependencies (Tasks 3 and 5). It correctly omits: Files to Modify, Files to Create, API Changes, Implementation Notes, Reuse Candidates, and Verification Commands — none of these section headers appear in the file.
